activities.name: Merge json files
activities.description: Need to have exactly the number on files required to do the merge.

value.value:
@concat(if(equals(activity('Get NbrAccountsNotSync').output.results[0].records[0].REPL,'0'),
           '',
           concat(activity('Get NbrAccountsNotSync').output.results[0].records[0].REPL, ' accounts in M3 are out of range for this process. Please, configure a new MBM initiator from MNS260 in M3 for Accounts ',
           pipeline().parameters.AccountsNotSyncMinRangeNbr,
           ' to ',
           string(add(int(pipeline().parameters.AccountsNotSyncMinRangeNbr), 4999)),' (Do not forget to update the parameters value for this validation).')
          ),
        if(equals(activity('Keep Only JSON Files').output.FilteredItemsCount,pipeline().parameters.FullLoadNbrFilesRequired),
           '',
           concat(if(equals(activity('Get NbrAccountsNotSync').output.results[0].records[0].REPL,'0'),'',' | '),
                  'The number of FullLoad files mismatch (',
                  string(activity('Keep Only JSON Files').output.FilteredItemsCount),
                  '/',
                  string(pipeline().parameters.FullLoadNbrFilesRequired),
                  ').')
          )
       )

url.value:
@concat(variables('varInforAPIBaseURL'),
        'M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/EXPORTMI/SelectPad?SEPC=|&HDRS=0&QERY=count(*) from OCUSMA where OKCONO = ',pipeline().globalParameters.InforCompanyNumber,' AND OKCUNO >= ''',
         pipeline().parameters.AccountsNotSyncMinRangeNbr,
         ''' AND OKCUNO < ''',
         pipeline().parameters.AccountsNotSyncMaxRangeNbr,
         '''&maxrecs=0')

source.query:
<fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false">
  <entity name="ava_parameter">
    <attribute name="ava_value" />
    <order attribute="ava_name" descending="false" />
    <filter type="and">
      <condition attribute="ava_name" operator="eq" value="InforAPIBaseURL" />
      <condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" />
    </filter>
  </entity>
</fetch>

query.value:
@concat('CALL management.SP_RunningTaskErrorSynapse(''',
        pipeline().parameters.RunningTask_TaskName,
        ''',',
        if(empty(pipeline().parameters.RunningTask_LogID),0,pipeline().parameters.RunningTask_LogID),
        ',',
        '1,',
        '''Error Data: ', replace(string(activity('DataFlow Account').error),'''',''''''),'
Pipeline Run ID: ', pipeline().RunId,
        ''')')

activities.name: If WarningFile
activities.description: If there is warning(s), then call RunningTaskError

value.value: @if(greater(length(string(activity('LookForWarningFile').output.value)),  1000), concat(substring(replace(string(activity('LookForWarningFile').output.value),'''',''''''),0, 900), ' AVERTISSEMENT : LE FICHIER COMPORTE PLUS DE 1000 LIGNES') , replace(string(activity('LookForWarningFile').output.value),'''',''''''))

query.value:
@concat('CALL management.SP_RunningTaskErrorSynapse(''',
        pipeline().parameters.RunningTask_TaskName,
        ''',',
        if(empty(pipeline().parameters.RunningTask_LogID),0,pipeline().parameters.RunningTask_LogID),
        ',',
        '1,',
        '''Error Data: ', replace(string(activity('DataFlow Account Update Bill To').error),'''',''''''),'
Pipeline Run ID: ', pipeline().RunId,
        ''')')

Remove file from Landing folder Update Bill To

dependsOn.activity: Copy file to Error folder Update Bill To
